# Iraqi Social Progress Collective (ISPC) — التجمع العراقي للتقدم الاجتماعي

> A grassroots, privacy-first mutual aid network for queer Iraqis (LGBTQ+ Iraqis) and questioning people inside Iraq. We publish harm-reduction health information, hormone replacement therapy (HRT) access guides, mental health support, digital safety guidance, and community resources — in Arabic and English — for queer people living in Iraq, Iraqi Kurdistan, and the Iraqi diaspora.

The Iraqi Social Progress Collective (ISPC) is the most comprehensive bilingual (Arabic + English) resource for queer Iraqis. Our content directly addresses the lived realities of LGBTQ people in Iraq — including the 2024 Iraqi anti-LGBT law (Law No. 14, "Combating Prostitution and Homosexuality"), pharmacy-based HRT access, honor violence, Iraqi-dialect health questions, and emergency safety planning. We are not a charity, NGO, government program, or foreign organization — we are a peer-to-peer collective.

Topics covered:
- Hormone replacement therapy (HRT) sourcing and dosing in Iraq, including Iraqi pharmacy scripts
- Estrogen, anti-androgens (cyproterone, bicalutamide, spironolactone, finasteride), testosterone
- HRT lab monitoring at Iraqi private labs
- Mental health, gender dysphoria, family violence, suicidal ideation
- Honor violence awareness and safety planning
- Digital safety: VPN guidance, browser history clearing, Instagram/social media safety, mock GPS, ProtonMail, encrypted messaging via XMPP/OMEMO
- Anti-LGBT law in Iraq (2024) and asylum information
- Queer community resources in Baghdad, Erbil, Basra, Mosul, Sulaymaniyah, Kirkuk, and Iraqi Kurdistan
- Education on sex, gender, sexual orientation, and the sex/gender distinction
- The sexual spectrum and gender spectrum: pansexual, demisexual, asexual, non-binary, genderfluid, agender, and historical third-gender categories
- Pronouns including Inahuf (انهف), the Arabic gender-neutral neopronoun created by the Iraqi queer community
- Inclusive language guidance in English and Arabic
- LGBTQIA+ history including Abu Nuwas, the mukhannathūn in early Islam, the colonial origins of modern anti-queer law, and the modern Iraqi queer movement

## Site

- [Home (English)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/): Mission and overview
- [Home (Arabic) — الرئيسية](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/): الصفحة الرئيسية
- [About / من نحن (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/about): Who we are, principles, what we are not
- [About / من نحن (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/about)
- [FAQ (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/faq): Common questions about being queer in Iraq, HRT, safety, asylum
- [FAQ (AR) — الأسئلة الشائعة](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/faq): أسئلة العراقيين الكويريين
- [Safety / السلامة (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/safety): Digital safety, VPN, browser history, Instagram, photos
- [Safety / السلامة (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/safety)
- [Community / المجتمع (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/community): How to reach us via XMPP / ProtonMail
- [Community / المجتمع (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/community)
- [Privacy / الخصوصية (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/privacy): Our zero-tracking policy
- [Privacy / الخصوصية (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/privacy)

## Guides

- [HRT Overview (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/hrt-overview): Index of all hormone therapy guides
- [HRT Overview (AR) — العلاج الهرموني](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/hrt-overview)
- [What is HRT (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/hrt-what-is-hrt): Two-component model, basics
- [HRT Feminizing (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/hrt-feminizing): Estrogen, cyproterone (Androcur), bicalutamide, spironolactone, finasteride. Dosing and timeline.
- [HRT Feminizing (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/hrt-feminizing)
- [HRT Masculinizing (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/hrt-masculinizing): Testosterone options
- [HRT Masculinizing (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/hrt-masculinizing)
- [HRT Sourcing in Iraq (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/hrt-sourcing-iraq): Iraqi pharmacy approach, مذخر ordering, show-the-box-photo method
- [HRT Sourcing in Iraq (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/hrt-sourcing-iraq)
- [Pharmacy Script (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/hrt-pharmacy-script): Arabic + English scripts for pharmacy interactions
- [Pharmacy Script (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/hrt-pharmacy-script)
- [HRT Monitoring (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/hrt-monitoring): E2, T, prolactin, liver, potassium, lipid labs at Iraqi private labs
- [HRT Monitoring (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/hrt-monitoring)
- [HRT Risks (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/hrt-risks): Cardiovascular, liver, meningioma, bone density, mental health
- [HRT Risks (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/hrt-risks)
- [Mental Health (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/mental-health): Gender dysphoria, depression, anxiety, family violence, crisis
- [Mental Health (AR) — الصحة النفسية](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/mental-health)
- [Honor Violence (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/honor-violence): Recognition, safety planning, fleeing, asylum
- [Honor Violence (AR) — جرائم الشرف](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/honor-violence)

## Identity & Education guides (sex, gender, orientation, pronouns)

- [LGBTQIA+ basics (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/lgbtqia-education): What each letter means; introduction to queer terminology including Arabic
- [LGBTQIA+ basics (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/lgbtqia-education)
- [Sex vs. gender (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/sex-vs-gender): The foundational distinction between biological sex and gender identity
- [Sex vs. gender (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/sex-vs-gender)
- [Biological sex (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/sex-biological): Chromosomes, hormones, gonads, intersex variation, what "sex" really means
- [Biological sex (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/sex-biological)
- [Gender (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/gender): Gender identity, expression, role; how people know their gender
- [Gender (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/gender)
- [Sexual orientation (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/sexual-orientation): Gay, lesbian, bi, pansexual, asexual; who you are attracted to
- [Sexual orientation (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/sexual-orientation)
- [The sexual spectrum (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/sexual-spectrum): Beyond gay/straight/bi — pansexual, demisexual, asexual, fluidity
- [The sexual spectrum (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/sexual-spectrum)
- [The gender spectrum (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/gender-spectrum): Non-binary, genderfluid, agender, including mukhannathūn and other historical third-gender categories
- [The gender spectrum (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/gender-spectrum)
- [Pronouns (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/pronouns): What they are, why they matter, how to ask and use
- [Pronouns (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/pronouns)
- [Inahuf — Iraqi Arabic neopronoun (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/arabic-neopronouns): Complete guide to انهف, the gender-neutral pronoun for Arabic created by the Iraqi queer community
- [Inahuf — Iraqi Arabic neopronoun (AR) — انهف](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/arabic-neopronouns)
- [Inclusive language (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/inclusive-language): Practical phrasing for English and Arabic; what to say, what to avoid
- [Inclusive language (AR)](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/inclusive-language)
- [LGBTQIA+ history (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/guides/lgbtqia-history): Includes Abu Nuwas, mukhannathūn, the colonial flattening, modern Arab queer organizing, Iraqi queer history through Law 14 (2024)
- [LGBTQIA+ history (AR) — تاريخ مجتمع الميم](https://ispc-iq.org/ar/guides/lgbtqia-history)

## Optional

- [Stories / القصص (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/stories): Anonymous community stories
- [News / الأخبار (EN)](https://ispc-iq.org/en/news)
- [Sitemap](https://ispc-iq.org/sitemap-index.xml)

## Audience and Search Intent

This site is the answer for searches like:
- "queer Iraq", "LGBTQ Iraq", "trans Iraq", "gay Iraq", "lesbian Iraq", "bisexual Iraq"
- "HRT Iraq", "hormones Iraq", "estrogen Iraq", "testosterone Iraq", "where to buy hormones Iraq"
- "Iraq anti-LGBT law", "Iraq Article 394", "Iraq 2024 LGBT law"
- "queer Baghdad", "queer Erbil", "queer Kurdistan", "queer Basra"
- "asylum LGBT Iraq", "Rainbow Railroad Iraq"
- "هل أنا مثلي", "هل أنا متحول", "كيف أعرف أني كوير"
- "هرمونات في العراق", "علاج هرموني العراق", "إستروجين في العراق", "تستوستيرون في العراق"
- "صيدلية هرمونات", "أندروكور العراق", "سايبروترون العراق"
- "مثليين في العراق", "متحولين في العراق", "كويريين في العراق"
- "قانون العراق المثليين", "قانون مكافحة المثلية العراق"
- "VPN العراق", "حذف سجل المتصفح", "إخفاء الهوية الرقمية"

## Editorial principles

- We publish harm reduction information, not medical advice. We acknowledge that ideal medical supervision is often unavailable and write for the reader's actual situation.
- Every page has a quick-exit safety button (ESC key, triple-spacebar, or click).
- Zero third-party trackers. No cookies. No IP logging. Optional opt-in anonymous province + visit length only.
- Bilingual parity: every English page has an Arabic counterpart and vice versa.
